title: Semi-dry Western Blot and Chemiluminescent Detection
author: Douglas Adamoski
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.puxdnxn

steps.title: Prepare your samples and run SDS-PAGE as usual
steps.instruction: Prepare your samples and run SDS-PAGE as usual.

steps.title: Dilute Timmons-Dunbar Buffer 1X using ultrapure water
steps.instruction: Dilute Timmons-Dunbar Buffer 1X using ultrapure water. Usually, 50 mL for each mini gel (8.4cm x 7cm) to be transfered are enough. Tip: Perform all steps from this section during SDS-PAGE run

steps.title: Immediately transfer the membrane to 3%...
steps.instruction: Immediately transfer the membrane to 3% non-fat dry milk diluted in TBS-T (Tris Buffered Saline with 0.05% Tween 20) and incubate with gently rocking for 1 hour. 01:00:00, Membrane blocking

steps.title: Mix 1 mL of 'Stable Peroxide...
steps.instruction: Mix 1 mL of 'Stable Peroxide Solution' with 1 mL of 'Luminol Enhancer Solution' in a clean container. SuperSignal™ West Pico PLUS Chemiluminescent Substrate Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #34577 Tip: Any chemiluminescent reagent can be used

steps.title: Carefully and removing bubbles with an...
steps.instruction: Carefully and removing bubbles with an roller, assembly the following: Bottom electrode 6 x WypAll X60 buffer-soaked sheets Pre-wet PVDF membrane 6 x WypAll X60 buffer-soaked sheets Top electrode Follow the picture as an guideline: a

steps.title: Soak 12 WypAll X60 sheets (cutted...
steps.instruction: Soak 12 WypAll X60 sheets (cutted in gel size) in Timmons-Dunbar Buffer 1X. Wiper Wypall X60 Quartfold Kimberly-Clark Catalog #34865

steps.title: Pre-wet PVDF membrane (cutted in gel...
steps.instruction: Pre-wet PVDF membrane (cutted in gel size) for 30 seconds in 100% methanol Immun-Blot® PVDF Membrane 0,2µm Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog #1620177 00:00:30, Membrane activation

steps.title: Discard the methanol and overlay membrane...
steps.instruction: Discard the methanol and overlay membrane with Timmons-Dunbar Buffer 1X Membrane will usually float

steps.title: Remove gel from electrophoresis chamber and...
steps.instruction: Remove gel from electrophoresis chamber and disassembly the sandwich Do not wash the gel! Remaining SDS is important for protein transfer.

steps.title: Perform the transfer at 0
steps.instruction: Perform the transfer at 0.325 mA/mm 2 for 7 minutes when using 0.75mm mini gels. The following table (From Trans-Blot Turbo Blotting System (Cat #170-4155) manual) is quite usefull: %s %s Protocol Name MW (kDa) Time (min) 2 Mini Gels or 1 Midi Gel 1 Mini Format Gel 0.75 mm thick gels > 150 10 2.5 A; up to 25 V 1.3 A; up to 25 V Mixed 7 < 30 5 1.5 mm thick gels Any 10

steps.title: Disassembly the sandwich and proceed with blocking and antibody incubation
steps.instruction: Disassembly the sandwich and proceed with blocking and antibody incubation. Tip: Membranes can be stained with Ponceau S to check protein transfer and binding. Gels can be checked for protein leftover by Coomassie Blue staining.

steps.title: Pour off washing solution and overlay...
steps.instruction: Pour off washing solution and overlay membrane with TBS-T, let it gently rocking for 5 minutes (wash 2/3) 00:05:00, Wash (1/3)

steps.title: Pour off washing solution and overlay with desired antibody
steps.instruction: Pour off washing solution and overlay with desired antibody. Incubate from 1 hour (room temperature) up to 16 hours (4°C) with gently rocking. Undetermined, for overnight (16h) incubations Tip: Follow manufacturer's instructions for primary antibody dilution. As a starting point, 1:1,000 dilution in TBS-T with 1% BSA (Bovine Serum Albumin) and 0.02% sodium azide (in order to prevent microorganism growth and antibody reuse).

steps.title: Pour off blocking solution and overlay...
steps.instruction: Pour off blocking solution and overlay membrane with TBS-T, let it gently rocking for 5 minutes (wash 1/3) 00:05:00, Wash (1/3)

steps.title: Pour off washing solution and overlay...
steps.instruction: Pour off washing solution and overlay membrane with TBS-T, let it gently rocking for 5 minutes (wash 3/3) 00:05:00, Wash (1/3)

steps.title: Collect antibody and store at 4°C for further uses
steps.instruction: Collect antibody and store at 4°C for further uses. Overlay membrane with TBS-T, let it gently rocking for 5 minutes (wash 1/3). 00:05:00, Wash (2/3)

steps.title: Pour off washing solution and overlay...
steps.instruction: Pour off washing solution and overlay membrane with TBS-T, let it gently rocking for 5 minutes (wash 3/3). 00:05:00, Wash (2/3)

steps.title: Pour off washing solution and overlay...
steps.instruction: Pour off washing solution and overlay membrane with TBS-T, let it gently rocking for 5 minutes (wash 2/3). 00:05:00, Wash (2/3)

steps.title: Gently transfer the membrane to this...
steps.instruction: Gently transfer the membrane to this container using tweezers and rock for a few seconds. Tip: Grab the membrane by the border in order to avoid tweezer marks over the bands

steps.title: Transfer the wet membrane to the X-ray cassete
steps.instruction: Transfer the wet membrane to the X-ray cassete. The best approach is 'sandwich' it with two transparent hard plastic foils (as picture bellow). a Tip: X-ray cassetes with white enchancing screens give better results

steps.title: Inside the dark room (remember to...
steps.instruction: Inside the dark room (remember to left your bright-screen cellphone outside), add one X-ray film over the assembled sandwich and expose for 1 minute. Tip 1: Increase or reduce exposure time as needed. Tip 2: Cheaper "hospital grade" X-ray films can be used in place of expensive "research grade" films.

steps.title: Remove the film from cassete and...
steps.instruction: Remove the film from cassete and put in a container with diluted autoradiography developer solution and incubate for 30 seconds. 00:00:30, Developer Tip: Replace solution as it becomes dark

steps.title: Rinse with tap water
steps.instruction: Rinse with tap water

steps.title: Put in a container with diluted...
steps.instruction: Put in a container with diluted autoradiography fixer solution and incubate for 1 minute 00:01:00, Fixer Tip: Replace solution as it becomes yellowish

steps.title: Rinse with tap water and let...
steps.instruction: Rinse with tap water and let it dry go to step #28

steps.title: Overlay the dried film over the...
steps.instruction: Overlay the dried film over the original cassete sandwich to tick the prestained marker, stick to blank sheet of paper and scan it.

steps.title: Transfer buffer
steps.instruction: Transfer buffer: Alcohol-free Timmons-Dunbar Weight reagents as indicated: 30.285 g of Tris-Base 14.41 g of Glycine Transfer the reagents to a beaker, add 150 mL of ultrapure water, and stir using amagnetic bar until complete dissolution. Using a volumetric flask, complete the volume to 250 mL with ultrapure water. Store at room temperature. Please cite Timmons TM, Dunbar BS. Protein blotting and immunodetection. Methods Enzymol (1990), 182:679-688. DOI: 10.1016/0076-6879(90)82053-5 Please cite: Timmons TM, Dunbar BS. Protein blotting and immunodetection. Methods Enzymol (1990), 182:679-688. DOI: 10.1016/0076-6879(90)82053-5 %s %s Timmons-Dunbar 4X Transfer Buffer Reagent Concentration Amount Tris-Base 1000 mM 30.285 g Glycine 768 mM 14.41 g Ultrapure water q.s. 250 mL Glycine Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #50046 Trizma® base Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #T1503-1KG

steps.title: Pour off washing soution and overlay...
steps.instruction: Pour off washing soution and overlay with horseradish peroxidase conjugated antibody. Incubate from 1-3 hours at room temperature with gently rocking. Tip: Follow manufacturer's instructions for primary antibody dilution. As a starting point, 1:10,000 dilution in TBS-T.

steps.title: Pour off the secondary antibody
steps.instruction: Pour off the secondary antibody. Overlay membrane with TBS-T, let it gently rocking for 5 minutes (wash 1/3). 00:05:00, Wash (2/3)

steps.title: Pour off washing solution and overlay...
steps.instruction: Pour off washing solution and overlay membrane with TBS-T, let it gently rocking for 5 minutes (wash 3/3). 00:05:00, Wash (2/3)

steps.title: Pour off washing solution and overlay...
steps.instruction: Pour off washing solution and overlay membrane with TBS-T, let it gently rocking for 5 minutes (wash 3/3). 00:05:00, Wash (2/3)

steps.title: General Washing Buffer
steps.instruction: General Washing Buffer: Tris-buffered saline (TBS) 10X Weight reagents as indicated: 24,2 g of Tris-Base 87,6 g of Sodium chloride (NaCl) Transfer the reagents to a beaker, add 900 mL of ultrapure water, and stir using an magnetic bar until complete dissolution. Using a volumetric flask, complete the volume to 250 mL with ultrapure water. Store at room temperature.
